META_DESC: Wellness package with overnight stay, three-course dinner and breakfast buffet at Hotel Asteria Venray. Four unique saunas on the Top Floor. From €139.50 p.p.
SCHEMA_OFFER_DESC: Overnight stay, welcome drink, bathrobe and slippers, free wellness access, three-course dinner and breakfast buffet.
HERO_TITLE:
Wellness, dinner
& a good night's sleep
HERO_SUBTITLE: Sauna, three-course dinner and a comfortable room. Everything arranged, all you need to do is arrive.
ARR_C_INTRO: One overnight stay with wellness, dinner and breakfast. Free access to the wellness on the Top Floor.
ARR_C_F1_DESC: Room of your choice, from Comfort to Suite
ARR_C_F2_CAP: Botega welcome drink in your room
ARR_C_F2_DESC: Botega prosecco in your room on arrival
ARR_C_F4_DESC: 4 saunas & steam bath on the Top Floor
ARR_C_F5_DESC: Seasonal dishes, no rush at the table
ARR_C_PRICE_SUB: p.n. based on a Comfort Room
DINER_ARIA: Three-course dinner, included in the package
WP_SUBTITLE: Discover all spaces of our 300m² wellness area on the Top Floor. Tap a location for more information about each space.
WP_IMG_ALT: Floor plan of the wellness area on the Top Floor of Hotel Asteria

ROOM_BRUIDSSUITE_DELTAS: freestanding bath + walk-in shower + mini fridge
